title: Deal Box
shortDescription: Best deals, coupons & discounts from 8,000+ brands in 31 countries. 100% free!
fullDescription:
Deal Box is your ultimate deal finder — discover the best deals, coupons, discounts, and promo codes from over 8,000 brands worldwide. All in one free app.

Stop wasting hours searching for sales across dozens of websites. Deal Box automatically collects, verifies, and curates the hottest campaigns, flash sales, clearance events, and exclusive offers from your favorite brands across 31 countries — updated every single day.

★ WHY DEAL BOX?

● Massive Brand Network
8,000+ top brands updated daily. Fashion, electronics, groceries, beauty, travel, dining, finance — every deal category you need.

● 31 Countries, One App
Shop smarter in USA, UK, Germany, Turkey, India, Brazil, Indonesia, Russia, Mexico, Japan, Philippines, Thailand, Canada, Australia, France, Italy, Spain, Egypt, Saudi Arabia, South Korea, Argentina, UAE, Vietnam, Poland, Malaysia, Colombia, South Africa, Portugal, Netherlands, Pakistan, and Sweden.

● Instant Deal Alerts
Follow your favorite brands and get instant push notifications when they drop new deals. Never miss a flash sale, limited-time coupon, or seasonal discount again.

● 13 Deal Categories
Shopping, Electronics, Fashion & Apparel, Food & Grocery, Dining & Restaurants, Beauty & Personal Care, Home & Living, Sports & Outdoor, Travel & Transport, Finance & Banking, Insurance, Automotive, Books & Hobby.

● Personalized Brand Watchlist
Create your brand watchlist. We notify you the second a new sale, coupon code, or promo goes live.

● Save & Track Deals
Bookmark deals you love, track expiration dates, and act before the best offers disappear.

● Smart Sorting & Filters
Sort by biggest discount, ending soon, newly added, or most popular. Find exactly what you want, fast.

● 100% Free to Use
All core features are completely free forever. Upgrade to Premium for unlimited alerts and an ad-free experience.

★ WHAT MAKES US DIFFERENT
✓ All deals in one place — no more tab-hopping
✓ Daily updates from 8,000+ verified brands
✓ Available in 19 languages
✓ Lightweight, fast, and incredibly easy to use
✓ No account required to start browsing

Join millions of smart shoppers. Download Deal Box now and never overpay again!
whatsNew:
